introSection: Half Pipe was a Intamin steel shuttle roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride had an unusual train made up of three cars. Riders were arranged in two circles of eight, facing outwards, on the outer cars. This maked for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Half Pipe was a Intamin steel shuttle roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.



The ride had an unusual train made up of three cars. Riders were arranged in two circles of eight, facing outwards, on the outer cars. This maked for a total of 16 riders.
